testcase.name: setup

error.message:
Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command '/home/wadmin/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -P 5037 -s b87adca4e724 install -r --no-incremental /home/wadmin/.appium/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-driver/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-server/apks/appium-uiautomator2-server-v9.11.1.apk' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb: failed to install /home/wadmin/.appium/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-driver/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-server/apks/appium-uiautomator2-server-v9.11.1.apk:
Host info: host: 'wws-cpu-202212-36', ip: '127.0.1.1' Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.17.0-20-generic', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {appium:appActivity: .MainActivity, appium:appPackage: satheia.app.ai, appium:appWaitDuration: 60000, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: b87adca4e724, appium:noReset: true, appium:platformVersion: 15, platformName: ANDROID}]}] Capabilities {appium:appActivity: .MainActivity, appium:appPackage: satheia.app.ai, appium:appWaitDuration: 60000, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: b87adca4e724, appium:noReset: true, appium:platformVersion: 15, platformName: ANDROID}
